summary: BLOCK 442 (Dream List UI Parity) - Full testing completed. All 9 features verified: (1) Dream List tab loads with 2 cards, (2) Variant pill 'SEA BLUE VINYL' appears on card image with gold border and glass morphism, (3) Variant label 'Sea Blue Vinyl' appears below title, (4) Median value badge '$45' displays on Speak Now card, (5) 'Set Value' button appears on HIT ME HARD AND SOFT card (no pricing), (6) Clicking 'Set Value' opens ValuationAssistantModal with correct record info, (7) Card styling matches Collection (border-honey/20, hover:-translate-y-1, backdrop blur), (8) Variant names have variant-pill-responsive class for desktop no-truncate, (9) Collection tab shows 4 record cards (regression OK).

issues: Nested button warning: 'Add Missing Values' button is inside 'Collection Value' button - causes React hydration warning

critical_code_review_comments: CollectionPage.js lines 1240-1345: WishlistCard correctly implements variant pill with gold border (#DAA520), glass morphism (blur(14px)), and same styling as RecordCard
CollectionPage.js lines 1287-1305: Median value badge and Set Value button logic correctly implemented - shows badge if median_value > 0, else shows Set Value button
CollectionPage.js lines 1311-1320: Variant label below title has variant-pill-responsive class for responsive truncation
App.css lines 622-641: variant-pill-responsive class correctly handles desktop no-truncate with @media (min-width: 1025px) rule
Minor: TreasuryHeader lines 96-125 has button nested inside button (Add Missing Values inside Collection Value button) - causes React warning but non-blocking
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test user with Dream List items: (1) HIT ME HARD AND SOFT by Billie Eilish (Sea Blue Vinyl, no median_value), (2) Speak Now by Taylor Swift (median_value=$45)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 442 (Dream List UI Parity) verified. Test user (test@example.com) has 4 Collection records and 2 Dream List items. WishlistCard uses data-testid values: wishlist-card-{id}, variant-wishlist-{id}, variant-label-wishlist-{id}, set-value-btn-{id}, median-value-{id}. Streaming links are MOCKED.

variant_label_below_title.details: Variant label 'Sea Blue Vinyl' appears below title with honey-amber color

median_value_badge.details: Median value badge shows '$45' on Speak Now card with gold glassy styling

set_value_button.details: 'Set Value' button appears on HIT ME HARD AND SOFT card (no median_value)

set_value_opens_modal.details: Clicking 'Set Value' opens ValuationAssistantModal with correct record info (HIT ME HARD AND SOFT by Billie Eilish)

card_styling_matches_collection.details: Card has border-honey/20, hover:-translate-y-1, backdrop blur - matches RecordCard

variant_no_truncate_desktop.details: variant-pill-responsive class present with CSS rule @media (min-width: 1025px) for no truncation

collection_tab_regression.details: Collection tab shows 4 record cards, RecordCard functionality intact
